message:
fix: CI — disable svg2png for Zig tests, remove puppeteer step

- Add enable_svg2png build option (default: true) to gate PlutoSVG/PlutoVG
- Zig native tests run with -Denable_svg2png=false (vendor C libs not in repo)
- Remove Chrome install step (puppeteer removed in previous commit)

files.patch:
@@ -27,7 +27,5 @@ jobs:
       - run: pnpm build
       - run: pnpm typecheck
       - name: Zig tests
-        run: cd wasm && zig build test
-      - name: Install Chrome for puppeteer tests
-        run: npx puppeteer browsers install chrome
+        run: cd wasm && zig build test -Denable_svg2png=false
       - run: pnpm test
